output.summary: Reduced batch tokens with longer warmdown and full-weight test-time training on the quantized model to get more updates and better sliding-window eval adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adapts to validation at eval time but training runs on the standard training data.
techniques: smaller TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS for more steps per minute
extended warmdown to match higher step count
full-weight TTT after quantization with sliding-window eval
